description: Neutral synthetic adopter shape — minimal bootstrap + one integration + one governed task + one evidence. Used by validate:adopter-sentinel as a canary that the framework's downstream-facing contract still works.

evidence.summary: Hello-world acceptance smoke ran clean against the example adopter sandbox.

neutrality.notes: All identifiers are generic placeholders (example-, EXAMPLE-, synthetic-adopter). No real adopter names, no proprietary identifiers.
